title: veronica longifolia subsp. sachalinensis
intro: Veronica longifolia subsp. sachalinensis, also known as Japanese Veronica or Veronica sachalinensis, is a plant species in the flowering plant family Plantaginaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Russia and Japan, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Veronica longifolia subsp. sachalinensis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne.
